headline: DMV Fantasy: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: DMV Fantasy carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 73.91, led by Jayden Daniels, Saquon Barkley, and George Kittle. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Rachaad White at 57.1 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On July 15, DMV Fantasy traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 1), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 9) while sending Trey McBride. George Kittle is now the verified TE starter at 79.5 C-AVI and 82.2 D-AVI; Brenton Strange is now the verified FLEX starter at 62.1 C-AVI and 77.4 D-AVI. It added 2 draft assets to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

On June 25, DMV Fantasy traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired Saquon Barkley, Trey McBride, Khalil Shakir, 2027 Round 3 (original roster 9) while sending Jameson Williams, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 12), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 12), 2027 Round 1 (original roster 9). Saquon Barkley is now the verified RB starter at 92.0 C-AVI and 86.7 D-AVI; Khalil Shakir is now the verified WR starter at 59.4 C-AVI and 69.2 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 3 draft assets, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jayden Daniels (96.2), Saquon Barkley (92.0), and George Kittle (79.5).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Rachaad White is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 57.1. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 11 offensive players, with 3 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 66.94.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
